author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Navigating Star Atlas - The Vision with CPO Danny Floyd

Hey everyone! We know a lot of you have been asking for a closer look into our development and team members, so we're starting a new YouTube series called "Navigating Star Atlas".

You can expect team member interviews, dev roundtables, and more from these.  

What's our vision? Why blockchain? Are we releasing in 100 years? CPO Danny Floyd answers these questions and more.  

 | Watch the full episode here: https://youtu.be/aHmp7HNk6gM?si=-YFqzLGS0gpW3PoC
